title: Reserve Bank of India imposes monetary penalty on Yes Bank Limited
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated April 27, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹31.80 lakh (Rupees Thirty One Lakh Eighty Thousand only) on Yes Bank Limited (the bank) for non-compliance with certain provisions of directions issued by RBI on 'Know Your Customer'. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of section 47A(1)(c) read with section 46(4)(i) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
